## Checklist

- [ ] This PR implements exactly one issue, and that issue was discussed/accepted first
- [ ] Tests are included for the behavior this changes (or the issue explains why not)
- [ ] No [TRUST.md](../blob/main/TRUST.md) commitment is weakened (data sources, no
      network calls, dependency-free engine, honest estimates)
- [ ] UI changes: every state keeps a non-color channel, and the accessibility checklist
      in CONTRIBUTING was applied
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed (README/TRUST/design docs)
